summary: Backend: 40/40 pytest pass (8 new Q&A engine tests + 19 studyos + 13 syllabus). Frontend: full happy path verified — signup → 3-step onboarding (India/class 10/CBSE) → Hero → Insights → ActiveSession with real Claude question, wrong-answer evaluation, feedback-card, next-question-btn.
critical_code_review_comments: All 40 backend tests pass in 53.5s including real Claude Sonnet 4.5 calls.

Q&A engine endpoints behave per spec: first question difficulty=medium, easier:true forces easy, wrong answer returns correct=false/score=0/streak_wrong=1/insight=steady., 3 wrong in a row triggers should_interrupt=true with reason 'three wrong in a row on real numbers' (lower-cased) and insight 'the room is breathing — let's slow down...'.
/api/sessions/{id}/event stores easier_requested in db.events and returns {ok:true, id:...}.
/api/insights returns weak_topics (5 entries, mastery=25), patterns (rule-based, may be empty for fresh user — acceptable), predictions, totals with overall_accuracy=0 after 3 wrong.

Frontend: HeroScreen, InsightsScreen, ActiveSession all wire data-testids correctly. Onboarding is a 3-step flow (where/class/syllabus) with continue buttons — works as intended. Real Claude question 'Prove that √2 + √3 is irrational.' generated and feedback rendered with model answer hint.

Minor (non-blocking): headline 'Your next move.' is split across two lines/spans so a flat text=Your next move locator fails — visually present and correct in screenshot. Signup/login form inputs lack data-testid attributes (signup-email/signup-password/auth-submit etc.), tests had to fall back to type/index selectors. Suggest adding data-testid to AuthScreen inputs for future regression robustness.
seed_data_creation: Tests dynamically signup users; test_qa_engine applies India class 10 (50 CBSE topics) and starts a session on Real Numbers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Q&A engine fully verified with real Claude. Onboarding is a 3-step flow (where → class → syllabus card with 'Use this curriculum'). ActiveSession works end-to-end. If AuthScreen gets data-testid attributes added, future Playwright runs will be cleaner. UI struggle modal was not exercised (gated by feedback==null per dev note); the API-level should_interrupt flag is verified in test_qa_engine.
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA — all flows pass.
